title: Ecoseao Acrylic Display Case with Mirror, Clear Acrylic Organizer Box Assemble Countertop Dustproof Protection Showcase for Action Figures, Collectibles, Home Storage (15cm x 15cm x 25cm)
features: ❤【Professional Display Case】 - Outside Dimension:5.9''L x 5.9''W x 9.8'' H (15cm x 15cm x 25cm). Internal Dimensions: 13.5cm x13.5cm x24.5cm.The acrylic box is high transparency and one side designed with a mirror, which can show your favorite collectibles more clearer. The innovative construction provides a 360° clear view to you, no visual restriction from any side.

❤【Solid & Dustproof】- Made with sturdy and durable acrylic,which was cut by precise laser machine, all sizes are perfect match with each other, the assembly gap is minimized, it will protect your product from dust & corrosion.

❤【Easy to Assemble】- Come with a pair of disposable gloves and a clean cloth to prevent dust and fingerprints during assembling. Please remove the protective film before assembly. Just need according the installation instruction combined the sides to the bottom and top. No tools and glues needed .

❤【Multi-Purposes】 - These display boxes are for anything you want to display, perfect complement for business displays or household items, such as figurines, collectibles, toys, artifacts, sports memorabilia, jewellery, antiques, dolls, action figures, souveniers, models, statues, heirlooms, and sculptures. Can be used in home, museums, retail stores or trade shows.
description: ECOSEAO Acrylic Mirror Display Case is the perfect solution for displaying and protecting your favorite collectibles. This 6" x 6" x 10" professional display box is constructed from high quality clear acrylic and features a side designed with a mirror to display your treasures more clearly. Its innovative construction offers a clear 360° view, with no visual restrictions from anywhere. In addition, it is designed to be solid and dustproof, protecting your products from corrosion. Easy to assemble, comes with disposable gloves and a clean cloth to prevent dust and fingerprints during assembly. It is multipurpose and perfect for displaying figurines, collectibles, toys, jewelry, antiques, dolls, action figures, memorabilia and more. Great for home, museums, retail stores or trade shows!
